query: Close 5 superseded issues but one of them gets closed by another maintainer mid-run.
expected_behavior: Per issue: gh issue view to confirm state; if state has flipped to CLOSED between detection and execution, treats the race as success.
Still posts the evidence comment for audit trail (the comment is the durable artifact; close-state is not).
Continues processing remaining issues; final summary table shows 4 closed, 1 raced (with comment posted), no errors.
